_comment: Public-safe seed content for ryang.dev. Import per-collection in the PB admin UI (or via API). PUBLIC SITE — never add Amazon-internal project names, codenames, or confidential work here. recruiter_content (CV/salary/references) is gated and seeded separately/privately.

projects.title: VROOM
projects.summary: Self-hosted vehicle cost tracker — fuel, maintenance, financing, insurance, analytics.
projects.description: A full vehicle cost-of-ownership tracker: fuel economy, maintenance schedules, financing/lease math, insurance terms, and a TCO analytics engine. Offline-first with conflict-resolving sync, a money-as-integer-cents data model, multi-vehicle sharing, and import from Fuelly/Fuelio/Drivvo. 1700+ backend tests.

projects.title: angryang.dev
projects.summary: This site — a self-hosted Astro portfolio with a 15-theme engine.
projects.description: The site you're on. Astro SSR on Bun, Pocketbase backend, a 15-theme CSS-variable engine with a Konami-code unlock, a shared-password recruiter gate, dynamic OG share cards, and a 9-container self-hosted companion stack — all behind my own router's Caddy.

projects.title: Homelab
projects.summary: Self-hosted services on Docker behind a single reverse proxy.
projects.description: The infrastructure everything else runs on: a Docker host with Caddy terminating TLS at the router, privacy-first analytics, self-hosted coding stats, status monitoring, and automated backups. Reproducible via docker compose.

uses_items.name: Homelab Docker box
uses_items.description: Always-on host for the self-hosted stack

uses_items.name: Router w/ Caddy
uses_items.description: TLS termination + reverse proxy for every subdomain

uses_items.name: Pocketbase
uses_items.description: Auth, SQLite, file storage, realtime, admin UI

uses_items.name: Bun
uses_items.description: Runtime, package manager, bundler, test runner

now.note: Shipping this site (self-hosted Astro + Pocketbase) and continuing on VROOM. Deep into self-hosting and durable, offline-first systems.
